sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72360" key="oi)kositi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκο-σῑτία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living at one's own expense,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
